title: Dark Fantasy: Nordic Tombs
description: Vast tomb ruins containing great treasures guarded by heroes of the past
body:
## **_Description_**
Immerse yourself in the harsh atmosphere of Skyrim right in Minecraft! This mod adds majestic Nordic dungeons to the game, where ancient evil and the clink of gold lurk around every corner.

## **Key Features:**
1. **A True Challenge:** Thanks to integration with DungeonZ, these dungeons become a fair and honest test. Breaking and placing most blocks is forbidden inside - you won’t be able to “dig” your way to the end. Only your combat skills and ingenuity will help you survive!
2. **Legions of Draugr:** The tombs swarm with undead from Draugr Invasion. The forgotten warriors of the past show no mercy to uninvited guests.
3. **Atmosphere of Immersion:** Explore the gloomy halls filled with intricate details from Supplementaries and hidden treasures. The dim torchlight, dusty altars, and narrow corridors create the genuine feeling of a real journey into the forgotten past of a long-lost civilization.
4. **Epic Finale:** Deep within the ruins awaits a powerful boss. Defeating him won’t be easy, but the reward will be worth every scar.

## **_Required Mods_**
### _Forge_
1. [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)
2. [DungeonZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeonz)
3. [Mebahel's Creatures - Draugr Invasion](https://modrinth.com/mod/mebahels-creatures-draugr)
4. [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)

   _Unfortunately, no equivalent of DungeonZ for Forge has been released yet, so the mod currently works only through the Sinitra Connector._

### _Fabric_
1. [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
2. [DungeonZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeonz)
3. [Mebahel's Creatures - Draugr Invasion](https://modrinth.com/mod/mebahels-creatures-draugr)
4. [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)

Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks

I express my gratitude to **Fonta59** for the magnificent map that inspired me while building the dungeon.
[SKYRIM map by Fonta59](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/skyrim-map-by-fonta59-skyrim-tes-interiors-with-download-1-20/)
